question: I am researching identity thefts in LA. First, identify the year between 2010 and 2019 with the highest number of identity theft incidents in LA. During that peak year, which area recorded the most arrests for moving traffic violations? What is the ratio of identity theft incidents that area had in 2020 to the total number of public schools in the city that area belongs to? Round the answer to the nearest integer. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/crime-data-from-2010-to-2019/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

filtered = df[df["Crm Cd Desc"] == "THEFT OF IDENTITY"].copy()
filtered["year"] = pd.to_datetime(filtered["DATE OCC"], errors="coerce").dt.year
answer = int(filtered.groupby("year").size().idxmax())
print(answer)
1.subquestion: From 2010 to 2019, which year has the most Los Angeles incidents with crime description "THEFT OF IDENTITY"?

2.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/arrest-data-from-2010-to-2019/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

df["year"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Arrest Date"], errors="coerce").dt.year
filtered = df[(df["year"] == 2016) & (df["Charge Group Description"] == "Moving Traffic Violations")]
answer = filtered.groupby("Area Name").size().idxmax()
print(answer)
2.subquestion: In <node_1 answer> Los Angeles arrest records, which area has the most arrests in the charge group "Moving Traffic Violations"?

5.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/crime-data-from-2020-to-present/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

df["year"] = pd.to_datetime(df["DATE OCC"], errors="coerce").dt.year
filtered = df[(df["year"] == 2020) & (df["AREA"] == 9) & (df["Crm Cd"] == 354)]
answer = int(len(filtered))
print(answer)
5.subquestion: Using the 2020 to present Los Angeles crime records, in 2020 how many incidents with crime code <node_4 answer> occurred in Area ID <node_3 answer>?

6.fact: The Van Nuys article states that Van Nuys is a neighborhood in Los Angeles, California.
6.subquestion: Neighborhood <node_2 answer> is in which California city?

7.fact:
import io
import json
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/public-school-locations-current-23297/files/data-oyCYxF.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
data = json.load(io.TextIOWrapper(obj["Body"], encoding="utf-8"))
df = pd.json_normalize(data["features"])

filtered = df[(df["properties.STATE"] == "CA") & (df["properties.CITY"] == "Los Angeles")]
answer = int(len(filtered))
print(answer)
7.subquestion: In the public school locations data, within city <node_6 answer> and state CA, how many public schools are listed?
